message:
fix(status): prevent data race in recovery goroutine

In SendRecoveryPromptByID, the goroutine accessed rm.prompt and
rm.includeBeadContext without holding the lock. SetPrompt() modifies
these values under the lock, creating a race condition.

Fix: Capture the values while holding the lock before starting the
goroutine.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
